title: AvePoint Research Reveals AI Visibility Gaps Have Nearly Tripled as AI Agents Scale and Almost Half of Enterprise Employees Now Rely on Agents Daily or Weekly
description: Third annual State of AI Report finds organizations lack the trust layer required to scale AI safely, as governance gaps, deployment delays, and AI-generated data are compounding the challenge Key Findings: Up to 1 in 5 organizations don’t know whether employees are using unsanctioned AI tools, a visibility gap that has nearly tripled since 2025 [...] The post AvePoint Research Reveals AI Visibility Gaps Have Nearly Tripled as AI Agents Scale and Almost Half of Enterprise Employees Now Rely on Agents Daily or Weekly appeared first on AiThority .

title: Selena Gomez Pregnancy Rumors Swirl Online After TikTok Video and AI Images
description: Selena Gomez faces pregnancy rumours after a TikTok video with fiancé Benny Blanco. The speculation, fuelled by AI-generated images, underscores challenges in distinguishing fact from fiction online.

title: Straiker Raises $64 Million for AI Security Platform
description: The startup’s platform can identify AI agents and provide visibility into their access, behavior, and risks. The post Straiker Raises $64 Million for AI Security Platform appeared first on SecurityWeek .

title: SpaceX Has Three AI Customers Paying $27.8 Billion a Year. How Big Can This Revenue Stream Get?
description: Could this be the company's largest growth driver over the next few years?

title: Milania Giudice Denies Viral Mugshot as AI, Addresses Arrest for First Time
description: Milania Giudice, daughter of Teresa Giudice, breaks her silence on a recent arrest and the spread of a fake AI-generated mugshot, emphasizing that the image is not real and reflecting on personal growth amidst family legal history.
